'''kotachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:phaenozygous|phaenozygous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phaenozygous|phaenozygous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kotachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kotachithi|kotachithi]] || [[word:kotachiji|kotachiji]] || [[word:kotachishi|kotachishi]] || [[word:kotachiki|kotachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kotachuthuthu|kotachuthuthu]] || [[word:kotachujuju|kotachujuju]] || [[word:kotachushushu|kotachushushu]] || [[word:kotachukuku|kotachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kotachuthu|kotachuthu]] || [[word:kotachuju|kotachuju]] || [[word:kotachushu|kotachushu]] || [[word:kotachuku|kotachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kotachufthuf|kotachufthuf]] || [[word:kotachufjuf|kotachufjuf]] || [[word:kotachufshuf|kotachufshuf]] || [[word:kotachufkuf|kotachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kotachethe|kotachethe]] || [[word:kotacheje|kotacheje]] || [[word:kotacheshe|kotacheshe]] || [[word:kotacheke|kotacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kotachothotho|kotachothotho]] || [[word:kotachojojo|kotachojojo]] || [[word:kotachoshosho|kotachoshosho]] || [[word:kotachokoko|kotachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kotachotho|kotachotho]] || [[word:kotachojo|kotachojo]] || [[word:kotachosho|kotachosho]] || [[word:kotachoko|kotachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kotachofthof|kotachofthof]] || [[word:kotachofjof|kotachofjof]] || [[word:kotachofshof|kotachofshof]] || [[word:kotachofkof|kotachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kotachïfthïf|kotachïfthïf]] || [[word:kotachïfjïf|kotachïfjïf]] || [[word:kotachïfshïf|kotachïfshïf]] || [[word:kotachïfkïf|kotachïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kotachïfthïfthïf|kotachïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:kotachïfjïfjïf|kotachïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:kotachïfshïfshïf|kotachïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:kotachïfkïfkïf|kotachïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kotachïfthïf|kotachïfthïf]] || [[word:kotachïfjïf|kotachïfjïf]] || [[word:kotachïfshïf|kotachïfshïf]] || [[word:kotachïfkïf|kotachïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kotachïfthïf|kotachïfthïf]] || [[word:kotachïfjïf|kotachïfjïf]] || [[word:kotachïfshïf|kotachïfshïf]] || [[word:kotachïfkïf|kotachïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kotachæthæ|kotachæthæ]] || [[word:kotachæjæ|kotachæjæ]] || [[word:kotachæshæ|kotachæshæ]] || [[word:kotachækæ|kotachækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kotachathatha|kotachathatha]] || [[word:kotachajaja|kotachajaja]] || [[word:kotachashasha|kotachashasha]] || [[word:kotachakaka|kotachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kotachatha|kotachatha]] || [[word:kotachaja|kotachaja]] || [[word:kotachasha|kotachasha]] || [[word:kotachaka|kotachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kotachafthaf|kotachafthaf]] || [[word:kotachafjaf|kotachafjaf]] || [[word:kotachafshaf|kotachafshaf]] || [[word:kotachafkaf|kotachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kotachasha|kotachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kotachshësha|kotachshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kotachrosha|kotachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kotachmusha|kotachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kotachyasha|kotachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokotachnkshësha|gokotachnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokotachnkrosha|gokotachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokotachnkmusha|gokotachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokotachnkyasha|gokotachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kotatachasha|kotatachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kotatachshësha|kotatachshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kotatachrosha|kotatachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kotatachmusha|kotatachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kotatachyasha|kotatachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokotatachnkshësha|gokotatachnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokotatachnkrosha|gokotatachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokotatachnkmusha|gokotatachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokotatachnkyasha|gokotatachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ketæchasha|ketæchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ketæchshësha|ketæchshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ketæchrosha|ketæchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ketæchmusha|ketæchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ketæchyasha|ketæchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goketæchnkshësha|goketæchnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goketæchnkrosha|goketæchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goketæchnkmusha|goketæchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goketæchnkyasha|goketæchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kotfachasha|kotfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kotfachshësha|kotfachshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kotfachrosha|kotfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kotfachmusha|kotfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kotfachyasha|kotfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokotfachnkshësha|gokotfachnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokotfachnkrosha|gokotfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokotfachnkmusha|gokotfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokotfachnkyasha|gokotfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
